name: Poul Cadovius Sofa
description: This rare three-seater sofa was designed by Danish designer Poul Cadovius and produced by France & Son in Denmark during the 1960s. It exemplifies the refined balance of form and function that characterizes the best of Danish modern furniture. The sofa combines a striking rosewood frame with its original bouclé fabric upholstery, creating an engaging contrast between richly patterned wood and soft, textured fabric.
